'''Ten Dorne''' was a [[Sluissi]] who worked on [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar's]] [[Shantipole Project]], the development of the [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter]] with complete access to [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] facilities in the [[Roche asteroid field]]. Dorne was working on a device known as a [[shearing plane]], which would render [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]] ineffective. After several close run-ins with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, Dorne reconsidered her position with the Alliance and defected to the Empire. The latest reports placed Dorne at the [[Vosteltig ship yards|Vosteltig shipyards]].
